title: Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a team version of Claude Code integrated into Slack for connecting company tools and managing tasks in shared channels. It replaces the previous Claude Slack chatbot.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's launch of Claude Tag, a team-oriented version of Claude Code that operates inside Slack. Claude Tag connects company tools and handles tasks within shared channels, and it replaces the previous Claude Slack chatbot. The shift positions Claude as an agent for collaborative work across a team rather than a standalone chat assistant, with API integration tying in existing company tools.
